inputs.name: Domain verification TXT value
inputs.instructions: In the AWS SES console, go to Configuration > Verified identities > [your domain]. Under 'Domain verification', copy the TXT record value.

inputs.name: DKIM token 1
inputs.instructions: In the AWS SES console under 'DKIM authentication', copy the Name of the first CNAME record. Paste only the token prefix — the part before '._domainkey'.

inputs.name: DKIM token 2
inputs.instructions: Copy the token prefix for the second DKIM CNAME record.

inputs.name: DKIM token 3
inputs.instructions: Copy the token prefix for the third DKIM CNAME record.

inputs.name: AWS region
inputs.instructions: The AWS region where your SES is configured (e.g. us-east-1). Used to build the inbound MX endpoint.
